full_description: Focus Timer is a productivity app that helps users stay focused and on track with their work. It uses the Pomodoro Technique to boost productivity. This technique involves working in focused, 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. After four cycles, you'll get a longer break of 15-30 minutes. This cycle of work and break helps you stay focused, avoid distractions, and maintain a sustainable work pace. With Focus Timer, you can customize the length of your work sessions and breaks to fit your needs. You can also track your progress and set goals for yourself. Whether you're a student, professional, or entrepreneur, Focus Timer can help you achieve your goals and stay productive.
